upasargachandrika.example_text: 'prasarpakAle samprApte nAnAdigByaH samAgatAn' (BA॰saBA॰12.16) prasarpo'gnivisarjanam iti niGaRwuriti nIlakaRWaH
'tataH prasarpakeByastu hiraRyaM susamAhitaH' (rA॰1.15.51) aByAgateBya iti tilakaH paricArakadvijeBya iti ca katakaH
'AlarkaM vizamiva sarvataH prasfptam' (uttara॰1.40) prasfptam=visfptam
'na hi tattasya vIrasya hfdayAdapasarpati DftarAzwrasya durbudDyA yad vfttaM dyUtakAritam' (BA॰ASrama॰1.27).. apasarpati=apEti apagacCati
'aTavA jAyamAnasya yacCIlamanu jAyate SrUyate tanmahArAja nAmftasyApasarpati' (BA॰vana॰8.11).. nApasarpati=nApEti=na pralIyate na vinaSyati
'utprekzitavikAro'pasarpet (mahAvIra॰4) apasarpet=rAjyakAryaM sannyasya svavaSAd vanaM pravajedityarTaH
'apAsarpad dvitripadaM kiYcit tvaritavikramaH' (rA॰3.30.23) apAsarpat=apAkrAmat
tAn (saYcArAn) mantripurohita… durgAntapAlAwavikezu …BaktitaH sAmarTyayogAccApasarpayet' (kO॰a॰1.12.8) apasarpayet=cArayet

'apasarpiRI na tezAM vE na cEvotsarpiRI dvija' (vi॰pu॰2.4.13) apasarpiRI=apakarzaSIlA (yugAvasTA) apasarpaScaraH spaSaH (amaraH) nAyaM me'pasarpaM dadAti=apasartuM nAnujAnAti
